title: Remove PDF Export Option from Reports and Dashboards Tab
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want only relevant export options available on the Reports and Dashboards tab, so that the interface is clean and I am not offered non-functional or unnecessary export formats.
description: Remove the PDF export option from the Reports and Dashboards tab. This change is scoped only to the Reports and Dashboards tab — other tabs retain their existing export options.
acceptance_criteria: PDF export option is removed from the Reports and Dashboards tab
Other export options (CSV, Excel, etc.) remain available
Export options on other tabs are not affected
ux_changes: PDF export option removed from the Reports and Dashboards tab export menu.
implementation_notes: Scoped to Reports and Dashboards tab only. Other tabs retain PDF export if applicable.
comment_summary: Clarification that the change applies only to the Reports and Dashboards tab, not all tabs. Developer implemented and confirmed on staging.
